entity.summary: Solana-based decentralized exchange and lending/trading protocol that wound down after a 2022 exploit and a 2024 SEC settlement. Governance restrictions became executable in January 2025, and Mango's later official shutdown update set February 3, 2025 as the final closure date.
entity.notes: Retain dead / regulation. January 13, 2025 remains an important governance wind-down milestone, but the later first-party shutdown update explicitly set February 3, 2025 as the closure date; HEI therefore uses February 3 as the entity death_date. The 2022 exploit remains major background rather than the immediate death_reason.

expected.summary: Solana-based decentralized exchange and lending/trading protocol that wound down after a 2022 exploit, 2024 SEC/CFTC-related regulatory settlements, and January 2025 governance changes that made borrowing and new positions economically unviable.
expected.notes: Classified as dead / regulation because the terminal wind-down followed SEC settlement and regulatory/legal pressure, with governance actions effectively ending core borrowing/lending/trading activity. The 2022 exploit is important background but not the immediate death_reason.

changes.summary: Solana-based decentralized exchange and lending/trading protocol that wound down after a 2022 exploit and a 2024 SEC settlement. Governance restrictions became executable in January 2025, and Mango's later official shutdown update set February 3, 2025 as the final closure date.
changes.notes: Retain dead / regulation. January 13, 2025 remains an important governance wind-down milestone, but the later first-party shutdown update explicitly set February 3, 2025 as the closure date; HEI therefore uses February 3 as the entity death_date. The 2022 exploit remains major background rather than the immediate death_reason.

events.title: Mango Markets final closure date reached
events.description: Mango's official shutdown update set February 3, 2025 as the final closure date and asked users to close positions before that time.
events.notes: This final closure marker follows the earlier January 13 governance changes already recorded in the canonical timeline.

evidence.title: Mango Markets Shutdown Update
evidence.notes: First-party update explicitly states that Mango Markets was closing on February 3, 2025 and asks users to close positions before then.

evidence.title: SEC Charges Entities Operating Crypto Asset Trading Platform Mango Markets
evidence.notes: Primary regulatory source for the settled charges, token-sale allegations, broker-registration allegations, and civil penalties that preceded the wind-down.
